caption: A television news broadcast features a split-screen display. On the left side, a man wearing a grey traditional garment, glasses, and a red cap is shown in a medium shot against a background of green foliage. On the right side, a smaller inset window shows the same man in a similar pose. Text overlays identify the guest as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS," under the heading "ON THE PHONE." A purple banner across the bottom displays the category "PLUS POLITICS" and the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The top left corner features the "plustv" logo. A white bar at the very bottom contains the word "SUBSCRIBE" and the web address "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE." Throughout the sequence, the image remains static with no visible changes in the man's expression, clothing, or the on-screen text.
